fieldValues.value: RFC-004 Change E: Define structured typeExpression JSON
Replace compact string type references as the normative source with structured `typeExpression` JSON using expression kinds: scalar, ref, array, map, object, union, literal, enum, and unknown.
Structured JSON avoids inventing a string DSL and keeps the source renderable to multiple targets.

sourceRefs.note: Structured RFC-004 process record derived from the RFC-004 proposal content.
